description.compare: Side-by-side - compare model outputs on the same prompt

modeDescription.arena: Models compete in a single-elimination bracket. Pick 2, 4, or 8 models - each round, pairs face the same prompt and you vote for the better response. Winners advance until one model remains.
modeDescription.compare: Pick models and run the same prompt through them simultaneously. No voting, no bracket - just pure side-by-side output comparison to evaluate which model best fits your needs.

persona.textareaPlaceholder: Optional system prompt applied to all models…

status.generating: Models are generating - click Stop All to cancel
status.voteToContinue: Vote on all matchups to continue to the next round
status.nextRoundReady: Start the next round when ready

confirmReset.title: Reset All
confirmReset.message: This will clear all models, prompts, personas, and any in-progress results. Continue?

disabledReason.pickOrRemove: Pick {{count}} more or remove to get {{nextValid}}

disabledReason.enterPromptNextRound: Enter a prompt for the next round

providers.edit_api_key_placeholder: Leave blank to keep current key

add.baseUrlHelperFull: Full API base URL including any path prefix. Models will be discovered from "<base_url>"/models

edit.enabledHelper: Controls proxy routing and API access. Disabled providers reject all requests.
edit.autodiscoveryHelper: Controls automatic model discovery. Disable to manually curate this provider's model catalogue.

virtualkeys.description: Issue keys for clients to access the proxy at

tooltip.name: Display name for the virtual key
tooltip.key: Preview of the API key (full key only shown once on creation)
tooltip.tokens: Total tokens consumed using this key
tooltip.lastUsed: When the key was last used for a request
tooltip.keyHashed: Key is hashed and cannot be recovered

virtualkeys.emptyState: No virtual keys. Create one to start using the proxy.

stepDescriptions.createKey: Click the button above to generate a new virtual key
stepDescriptions.copyKey: The complete key is shown only once on creation
stepDescriptions.makeRequests: Use your key to call the proxy API endpoints

note.title: Note:
note.text: Virtual keys are used to authenticate requests to the proxy. Each key tracks its own token usage. You can create multiple keys for different clients or environments.

modal.warningTitle: This key cannot be recovered after you close this modal.
modal.warningText: Virtual keys are hashed before storage. Copy it now or it is gone forever.

form.name: Name
form.providerInstructions: Click a provider to restrict access. All are accessible by default.
form.stripReasoningDescription: When enabled, reasoning/thinking tokens are removed from streaming responses for clients that cannot handle them.

logs.description: Monitor API requests across all providers and keys

tooltip.hash: Unique hash of the request body
tooltip.model: Model ID used for the request
tooltip.status: HTTP status code of the response

emptyState.appNoEntries: No log entries yet - logs will appear here as the server generates output

emptyState.noEntries: No log entries yet - logs will appear here as the server generates output

proxy.title: Proxy
proxy.description: Configure proxy request behavior and timeouts.
proxy.requestTimeout.description: Maximum time for non-streaming requests before timing out. Streaming requests automatically get 10× this duration to accommodate thinking/reasoning models.
proxy.keyCacheTtl.description: How long decrypted provider API keys are cached. Higher values reduce latency on the first request after cache expiry (Argon2id key derivation is ~12ms).
proxy.ttftTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait for the first streaming token before failing over to the next provider. Disabled means immediate commit (no failover on slow first token).
proxy.streamStallTimeout.description: Maximum silence during streaming before the connection is cut. After 50 chunks, the timeout is automatically extended 3× to tolerate tool calls and long reasoning.

rateLimit.title: Rate Limiting
rateLimit.description: Control request throughput per virtual key to prevent abuse and ensure fair usage.
rateLimit.enableDescription: Throttle proxy requests per virtual key
rateLimit.requestsPerSecond.description: Sustained request rate allowed per virtual key (0 = unlimited)
rateLimit.burstSize.description: Maximum number of simultaneous requests before throttling kicks in
rateLimit.ipRateLimitingDescription: Per-IP rate limiter (DoS protection, runs before auth)
rateLimit.ipRequestsPerSecond.description: Sustained request rate per IP address (0 = unlimited)
rateLimit.ipBurstSize.description: Maximum simultaneous requests per IP before throttling kicks in
rateLimit.backpressureDescription: Shared wait behavior for both per-key and IP rate limiters
rateLimit.maxWait.description: Maximum time to wait before rejecting a rate-limited request. If a token becomes available within this window, the request proceeds; otherwise 429 is returned.

circuitBreaker.title: Circuit Breaker & Failover
circuitBreaker.description: Configure how the proxy handles provider failures and rate-limited requests.
circuitBreaker.enableDescription: Temporarily stop routing to providers that are failing
circuitBreaker.failureThreshold.description: Consecutive failures before the circuit opens and stops routing to the provider
circuitBreaker.cooldownPeriod.description: Time to wait before retrying a provider with an open circuit
circuitBreaker.failoverOnRateLimitDescription: Route to next failover group member when a provider returns 429

logging.title: Logging
logging.logRetention.disabled: Log retention is disabled. Logs will accumulate indefinitely until manually purged.
logging.logRetention.description: Automatically delete logs older than this period
logging.staleRequestTimeout.disabled: Stale request detection is disabled. Orphaned requests from server restarts will still be marked as failed, but age-based cleanup will not run.
logging.staleRequestTimeout.description: Mark pending/streaming requests as "interrupted" if they remain in-progress longer than this. Accounts for providers with long time-to-first-token.

discovery.title: Model Discovery
discovery.description: Configure how and when models are auto-discovered from your providers.
discovery.discoveryInterval.disabled: Periodic discovery is disabled. Models will only be discovered when you click "Discover Now" or "Discover All", or when a new provider is created.
discovery.discoveryInterval.description: How often to automatically re-discover models from all enabled providers
discovery.discoverOnStartupDescription: Run discovery for all providers when the server starts
discovery.discoverOnProviderCreationDescription: Automatically discover models when a new provider is added

dataStorage.title: Data Storage
dataStorage.description: Manage browser-local session data. Persisted data survives page reload and browser restarts.
dataStorage.persistChatDescription: Remember messages, prompt, and persona across sessions
dataStorage.persistChatConfirm: This will clear all saved chat messages. Continue?
dataStorage.persistArenaDescription: Remember bracket state and prompts across sessions
dataStorage.persistArenaConfirm: This will clear all saved arena data. Continue?
dataStorage.persistConversationDescription: Remember conversation state and settings across sessions
dataStorage.persistConversationConfirm: This will clear all saved conversation data. Continue?
dataStorage.saveMatchHistoryDescription: Automatically save completed arena and compare sessions
dataStorage.saveMatchHistoryDisabled: Arena history disabled - existing entries preserved
dataStorage.maxSavedMatches.description: Oldest matches are automatically removed when the limit is reached
dataStorage.clearHistoryConfirm: Delete all arena history? This cannot be undone.
dataStorage.clearCacheConfirm: Clear all cached provider quota data? Fresh data will be fetched on next refresh.
dataStorage.dismissedErrorBannersDescription: Reset dismissed sidebar error pill states
dataStorage.providerQuotaCache.description_one: {{count}} cached entry (NanoGPT, Z.ai Coding Plan, DeepSeek)
dataStorage.providerQuotaCache.description_other: {{count}} cached entries (NanoGPT, Z.ai Coding Plan, DeepSeek)
dataStorage.cachedEntryCount_one: {{count}} cached entry (NanoGPT, Z.ai Coding Plan, DeepSeek)
dataStorage.cachedEntryCount_other: {{count}} cached entries (NanoGPT, Z.ai Coding Plan, DeepSeek)
dataStorage.providerQuotaCacheDescription_one: {{count}} cached entry (NanoGPT, Z.ai Coding Plan, DeepSeek)
dataStorage.providerQuotaCacheDescription_other: {{count}} cached entries (NanoGPT, Z.ai Coding Plan, DeepSeek)

backup.title: Database Backup
backup.description: Create and download PostgreSQL backups. Uses `pg_dump` with custom format for efficient compression.
backup.restoreRequirements.masterKeyDescription: Provider API keys are AES-256-GCM encrypted. Restoring with a different MASTER_KEY will leave all provider keys unrecoverable.
backup.restoreRequirements.adminToken: Admin token is not in the backup
backup.restoreRequirements.adminTokenDescriptio: Your current admin token will continue to work after restore.
backup.restoreRequirements.virtualKeysDescripti: Only SHA-256 hashes are stored. If you lose the plaintext virtual keys, they cannot be recovered from the backup.
backup.restoreSuccess: Database restored. The server is restarting…
backup.serverRestarting: Server is taking longer than expected to restart

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.themeDescription: Switch between dark and light mode

toast.title: Toast Notifications
toast.description: Choose where notification toasts appear and how long they stay visible.
toast.testNotification: Test notification - you'll see toasts here

dashboard.title: Dashboard Refresh
dashboard.description: Configure how often the dashboard stats and charts are refreshed automatically. Manual refresh button is hidden when set to 10 seconds or faster.
dashboard.refreshInterval.description: At 10 seconds the manual refresh button is hidden. Changes take effect on next navigation to the dashboard.
dashboard.disabled: Dashboard auto-refresh disabled - use manual refresh
dashboard.intervalSet_one: Dashboard refresh set to every {{seconds}} second
dashboard.intervalSet_other: Dashboard refresh set to every {{seconds}} seconds

sidebarQuota.title: Sidebar Quotas
sidebarQuota.description: Configure how often provider quota and balance data is refreshed in the sidebar panel.
sidebarQuota.showQuotasPillDescription: Display the quota panel in the sidebar
sidebarQuota.refreshInterval.description: Minimum 1 minute. Changes take effect on next scheduled refresh.
sidebarQuota.disabled: Sidebar quota auto-refresh disabled - use manual refresh
sidebarQuota.enabledQuotas: Sidebar quotas enabled - pill visible and auto-refresh resumed
sidebarQuota.disabledQuotas: Sidebar quotas disabled - pill hidden and auto-refresh paused
sidebarQuota.intervalSet_one: Quota refresh set to every {{minutes}} minute
sidebarQuota.intervalSet_other: Quota refresh set to every {{minutes}} minutes

deleteConfirmModal.areYouSure: Are you sure you want to delete {{entityName}}? This action cannot be undone.

restoreConfirmModal.title: Restore Database Backup
restoreConfirmModal.overwriteWarning: This will permanently overwrite all data
restoreConfirmModal.destroyWarning: This will permanently destroy all current data and replace it with the backup. This action cannot be undone.
restoreConfirmModal.masterKeyInfo: Provider API keys are AES-256-GCM encrypted using a key derived from your MASTER_KEY. Restoring with a different MASTER_KEY will leave all provider keys unrecoverable.
restoreConfirmModal.adminTokenNotInBackup: Admin token is not in the backup:
restoreConfirmModal.adminTokenInfo: It is stored on the filesystem. Your current admin token will continue to work after restore.
restoreConfirmModal.virtualKeysInfo: Only SHA-256 hashes are stored. If you lose the plaintext virtual keys, they cannot be recovered.

modelTable.whenModelDiscovered: When the model was last seen/discovered
modelTable.noModelsDiscovered: No models discovered yet. Add a provider and discover models.
modelTable.deleteDisabledMessage_one: This will permanently delete {{count}} disabled model. If autodiscovery is enabled on their provider, they will be re-discovered on the next cycle. Disable autodiscovery on the provider to prevent this.
modelTable.deleteDisabledMessage_other: This will permanently delete {{count}} disabled models. If autodiscovery is enabled on their provider, they will be re-discovered on the next cycle. Disable autodiscovery on the provider to prevent this.

virtualModelTable.deleteDisabledMessage_one: This will permanently delete {{count}} disabled model. If autodiscovery is enabled on their provider, they will be re-discovered on the next cycle. Disable autodiscovery on the provider to prevent this.
virtualModelTable.deleteDisabledMessage_other: This will permanently delete {{count}} disabled models. If autodiscovery is enabled on their provider, they will be re-discovered on the next cycle. Disable autodiscovery on the provider to prevent this.

arenaHistoryModal.completedSessionsHere: Completed arena and compare sessions will appear here

requestLogDetail.title: Request Details
requestLogDetail.totalWallClockTime: Total wall-clock time from request start to response end
requestLogDetail.timeToReceiveHeaders: Time to receive the first HTTP response headers from the upstream provider
requestLogDetail.timeToFirstToken: Time to First Token: delay between request start and the first token of the response body (streaming) or full response (non-streaming)
requestLogDetail.outputTokensPerSecond: Output tokens per second during the generation phase (excludes time-to-first-token). Shown as '-' when generation time is negligible.
requestLogDetail.sumOfTokens: Sum of prompt + completion + reasoning tokens
requestLogDetail.timeToParseRequest: Time to parse and validate the incoming request body
requestLogDetail.timeToResolveFailover: Time to resolve the failover group to a specific model and provider
requestLogDetail.timeToLookupModel: Time to look up the model configuration in the database
requestLogDetail.timeToLookupProvider: Time to look up the provider details in the database
requestLogDetail.timeToDecryptKey: Time to decrypt the provider API key
requestLogDetail.timeToEstablishTcp: Time to establish the TCP connection to the upstream provider
requestLogDetail.timeToReadSettings: Time to read settings from the database
